name_ja: アジアバイタルコンポーネンツ
layer_label_en: Thermal · liquid cooling for AI servers
layer_label_zh: 熱管理 · AI 伺服器液冷

operating_margin.vs_street: +150 bps vs street, liquid > air mix

multiple.vs_history: 5y median ≈ 14×; thermal-systems peer (Vertiv VRT) ≈ 30×; we use 22× as transition multiple

price_target.kill_condition: If a hyperscaler reverts to air for next-gen flagship → cut half. Two reversions → exit. Margin compression > 300 bps without volume offset → review.

A_ai_exposure.note: AI server thermal estimated 35–40% of FY26 revenue; rising on GPU power roadmap.

B_order_visibility.tier: [draft — needs hyperscaler design-win confirmation in 法說會 or 重大訊息]
B_order_visibility.note: Target ★★★★ once two named hyperscalers + capex announcement confirmed.

C_growth_potential.note: GPU power 700W → 1200W → 1800W → liquid mandatory; 5y rev CAGR draft 28%.

D_cheap_to_fair.note: Auto-computed from PT vs price; gated by cycle multiplier.

E_increasing_moat.note: CDU + cold-plate + manifold integration is system-level — sticky once designed in.

F_revaluation.note: Priced as fan/heatsink; transitioning to thermal-systems supplier.

customers_named: NVIDIA reference design (GB200 / GB300 cold-plate) — public attribution
Microsoft Azure (custom rack thermal) — public attribution
order_visibility.capacity_locked: [draft — Tucheng / Wujiang liquid-cooling line capex; analyst to confirm exact ramp schedule]

receipts.summary_en: Capex announcement for liquid-cooling capacity expansion with named-customer language.
receipts.summary_zh: 液冷產能擴建公告 · 客戶承諾語言。
receipts.source: 公開資訊觀測站 · 重大訊息 (3017)

receipts.summary_en: Most recent 法說會 quote on AI thermal % of revenue + Q+N visibility numbers.
receipts.summary_zh: 最新法說會: AI 散熱比重 + Q+N 訂單能見度。

receipts.summary_en: Copper / pump / manifold lead-time data + competitor capacity (Auras 3653, Sunon 2421) channel checks.
receipts.summary_zh: 銅材 / 泵浦 / 歧管交期 + 競品 (3653 雙鴻 / 2421 建準) 產能。

order_visibility.kill: Hyperscaler reverts to air for next-gen (signaled at OCP summit) → cut half. Two reversions → exit.

mechanism.en: [DRAFT ≥600 words required] AI rack power density runs 30 kW (Hopper-class) → 120 kW (Blackwell GB200 NVL72) → projected 200 kW+ (Rubin / next-gen) — air cooling becomes physically impossible above ~80 kW per rack at typical data-center inlet conditions. Liquid cooling (cold plate + CDU + manifold + RDHx + sidecar) becomes the mandatory path. AVC's per-AI-rack thermal content runs $8–15 K vs ~$1.2 K in a legacy air-cooled 2 U server — a 7–10× content uplift. Quantify hyperscaler liquid-cooling adoption pace by IT-rack counts and AVC share of qualified suppliers.

moat_widening.en: [DRAFT] System-level integration, customer-specific thermal qualification cycles 12+ months, sticky once designed in. Capacity expansion + IP in CDU/manifold compounds the lead. Auras/Sunon catching up on cold plate but lag on full system integration.

revaluation_thesis.en: [DRAFT] Priced as a notebook fan maker on legacy multiple (14× 5-year median). Liquid cooling = system-level supplier with structurally higher OP margin → multiple converges toward thermal-systems peer (Vertiv VRT in US ~30×). Our 22× is half the gap.

kill_condition.en: Hyperscaler liquid-cooling adoption pace falls below GPU power roadmap (one major customer reverts to air for next-gen flagship). Or competitive entrants (Auras, Sunon, Cooler Master) compress pricing > 300 bps without volume offset.

if_kill_then.en: Cut half on first major hyperscaler reversion. Exit on second. Move to power (2308 Delta) which runs on rack-count not cooling-method.
